data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding tamper-proof approval tokens.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to tamper-proof approval tokens, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this capability is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions the need for security features, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any API interactions or validations that would support the expected outcome of the scenario. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a clear requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of tamper-proof approval token functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tamper-proof approval token functionality.
